message:
fix(codegen): Universal fixes for core3 test compilation (Phase 3)

Priority 1: Fix empty slice indexing in type inference
- Use std.meta.Elem(@TypeOf(...)) instead of ...[0] in var_hoisting.zig
- Use std.meta.Elem(@TypeOf(...)) instead of ...[0] in for_basic.zig
- Safely handles empty arrays like INVALID_UNDERSCORE_LITERALS
- Fixes test_float empty slice compilation error

Priority 2: Fix unknown type list method dispatch
- Remove isUnknown check from list method dispatch condition
- Unknown list types (like empty list literals) now use list methods
- Allows [].extend() to route to proper handler

Priority 3: Fix .neg() and .pyInvert() on primitive types
- Only emit .neg()/.pyInvert() for explicit PyValue types
- Unknown types fall through to runtime type checking
- Fixes test_itertools unary negation on unknown types

All fixes are pattern-based and apply universally across the codebase.
